description: Style Note Topping every teen's wardrobe wish-list is this striking pair of shoes. Girly and stylish, this pair of shoes goes very well with western and ethnic outfits. Wear it with jeans, shorts or kurtis for a cute look that is oh so charming! Product Details Blunt toed grey shoes with stitched detail Canvas upper with Nubuck overlays, reinforced overlay at the heel collar, three leather velcro closure straps in the midfoot region Upper adhered to the outsole Tough rubber outsole with grooves around the border, terraced lugs and textured Material and Care Fabric and Leather Wipe with a clean dry cloth when needed
